description: Fragment of a letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Handwriting of Hillel b. ʿEli? Mentioning someone's brother and al-Nezer. The writer then asks the addressee to pass on his copious excuses for not having rendered sufficient service to someone who has bestowed much favor (tafaḍḍulāt) upon him. The margin contains the interesting phrase "I will not drink again except. . ."
